title: zscalerctl dump manifest
description: Schema for the manifest.json written at the root of a `zscalerctl dump` directory.

schema.description: Versioned schema identifier for this artifact.

redaction.description: Redaction mode the dump was produced under.

warning.description: Operator warning that sanitized dumps remain confidential operational data.

status.description: Whether every selected resource succeeded (complete) or some failed (partial).

errors.description: Count of per-resource failures; omitted when zero.

errors_path.description: Relative path to errors.ndjson; omitted when there are no errors.

product.description: Product family, e.g. zia, zpa, ztw, zcc, zidentity.

shape.description: Resource shape (e.g. singleton); omitted for ordinary list resources.

path.description: Relative path to the resource's JSON file; omitted on error.

error_kind.description: Failure classification when status is error.
